src/main/java/com/example/demo/config/Da.general_idea: Remove the import for ProductCategory since it is no longer referenced in the configuration.
Remove the exposure configuration logic for Product and ProductCategory entities.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/config/Da.before:
config.getExposureConfiguration()
		.forDomainType(Product.class)
		.withItemExposure((metdata, httpMethods) -> httpMethods.disable(theunsupportmethod) )
		.withCollectionExposure((metdata, httpMethods) -> httpMethods.disable(theunsupportmethod));
		
		config.getExposureConfiguration()
		.forDomainType(ProductCategory.class)
		.withItemExposure((metdata, httpMethods) -> httpMethods.disable(theunsupportmethod) )
		.withCollectionExposure((metdata, httpMethods) -> httpMethods.disable(theunsupportmethod));

src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.general_idea: Removed the @CrossOrigin annotation from the controller class.
Changed the GET mapping path from /category to /api/category.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues if JDK 21-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set Lombok version and change scope to provided.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency for OpenAPI documentation.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Updated the database name in the JDBC URL from 'full-stack-ecommerce' to 'e_commerce'.
Removed the explicit Hibernate MySQL dialect configuration, likely relying on auto-detection or newer default behavior.
Disabled the Open Session In View pattern by setting spring.jpa.open-in-view to false.
